heading: Task force on job repatriation and manufacturing growth
label: 1543 Task force on job repatriation and manufacturing growth
text: The Secretary of Commerce shall maintain a task force on job repatriation and manufacturing growth and shall produce an annual report on related incentive strategies, implementation plans and program results.
notes: CodificationSection is from the appropriation act cited as the credit to this section.
